title: Naba's Minimal Armor
description: A minimal armor resource pack that keeps armor looking like armor.
body: **❗ Requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** This resource pack changes the armor textures and models to show more of your skin while still making it look like you're wearing armor. Random info: - Leather and Chainmail armor are kept as in vanilla for those who decorate with armor stands - All trims have been modified to fit the new armor textures and models - The arm bits adapt to slim skins - Compatible with [Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender) ![Every armors changed in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/19zJel6O/images/a1607ea6e783586ffdee9a26d018c2669dbc5824.png) ---
